ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "brand_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo image */,
  "brand_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "brand_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the category */,
  "category_gender" TEXT /* Gender the category is designed for (e.g., men, women, children) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the size chart belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the size chart applies to */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "chart_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the size chart */,
  "chart_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  "chart_version" TEXT /* Version number of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 2, 4, 6S) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the size appears in the chart */,
  "size_image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the size */,
  "size_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or information about the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "height_min" TEXT /* Minimum height for the size */,
  "height_max" TEXT /* Maximum height for the size */,
  "weight_min" TEXT /* Minimum weight for the size */,
  "weight_max" TEXT /* Maximum weight for the size */,
  "chest_min" TEXT /* Minimum chest measurement for the size */,
  "chest_max" TEXT /* Maximum chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist_min" TEXT /* Minimum waist measurement for the size */,
  "waist_max" TEXT /* Maximum waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip_min" TEXT /* Minimum hip measurement for the size */,
  "hip_max" TEXT /* Maximum hip measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder_min" TEXT /* Minimum shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder_max" TEXT /* Maximum shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length_min" TEXT /* Minimum sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length_max" TEXT /* Maximum sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam_min" TEXT /* Minimum inseam measurement for the size */,
  "inseam_max" TEXT /* Maximum inseam measurement for the size */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the recommendation is based on */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "recommended_size_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommended size */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence for the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the customer */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement of the customer */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement of the customer */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement used */,
  "date_of_measurement" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feedback is about */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the feedback is about */,
  "fit_rating" TEXT /* Fit rating (e.g., too small, fits well, too large) */,
  "fit_rating_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the fit rating */,
  "fit_rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fit rating */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for */,
  "product_material" TEXT /* Material the product is made of */,
  "product_color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "product_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart associated with the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart associated with the product size */,
  "size_chart_version" TEXT /* Version of the size chart associated with the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, processed) */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the reason of the return */,
  "return_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, editor) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset */,
  "password_reset_token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date and time for the password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view size chart) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access (e.g., Chrome, Safari) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
